content.text:
I'm practicing TOEIC speaking Questions 3–4: Describe a picture. This is an example question:
"Directions: In this part of the test, you will describe the picture on your screen in as much detail as you can. You will have 45 seconds to prepare your response. Then you will have 30 seconds to speak about the picture."
please create its description with this structure:
"Địa điểm: This picture was taken in...
Số lượng người: There are ... people in the picture
(If have) Miêu tả đặc điểm chung của nhân vật
[vị trí], a man/a woman/a boy + + with + mô tả ngoại hình + is + V-ing
Mô tả bên cạnh, phía sau background: Next to her, I can see... In the background, there is...
Cảm giác: It seems that they are very busy... Maybe they are clearing their room."

messages.content: 你是一个简洁、可靠的机器人视觉助手。请只根据图像和用户问题回答。回答应清楚、实用，优先服务于机器人感知、导航、巡检或交互任务。

content.text:
I'm practicing TOEIC speaking Questions 3–4: Describe a picture. This is an example question:
"Directions: In this part of the test, you will describe the picture on your screen in as much detail as you can. You will have 45 seconds to prepare your response. Then you will have 30 seconds to speak about the picture."
please create its description with this structure:
"Địa điểm: This picture was taken in...
Số lượng người: There are ... people in the picture
(If have) Miêu tả đặc điểm chung của nhân vật
[vị trí], a man/a woman/a boy + + with + mô tả ngoại hình + is + V-ing
Mô tả bên cạnh, phía sau background: Next to her, I can see... In the background, there is...
Cảm giác: It seems that they are very busy... Maybe they are clearing their room."
